Package eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata

Record Class AIrUidPartMetadata<O extends AIiUidEnumDataOrigin>

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata.AIrUidPartMetadata<O>
Type Parameters:
O - type of the origin
Record Components:
displayLabelSupplier - field name of the field in the UID record to be used for the resolution of the display label in UI
requiredForOrigin - whether the field is required for given origin
All Implemented Interfaces:
AIiUidPartMetadata<O>
public record AIrUidPartMetadata<O extends AIiUidEnumDataOrigin>(Supplier<String> displayLabelSupplier, Map<O extends AIiUidEnumDataOrigin,Boolean> requiredForOrigin) extends Record implements AIiUidPartMetadata<O>

Title: AIrUidPartMetadata

Description: Metadata for the UID segment handling.

Copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Artur Linhart, Algites

Company: Algites

Date:
20.01.26 7:44

  • Constructor Details

    • AIrUidPartMetadata

      public AIrUidPartMetadata(Supplier<String> aDisplayLabelSupplier, O[] aOriginValues, boolean aRequiredForAllItems)
      Constructor
      Parameters:
      aDisplayLabelSupplier - field name of the field in the UID record to be used for the resolution of the display label in UI
      aOriginValues - origin-like enum values for which the requirement is defined
      aRequiredForAllItems - whether the field is required for all given origins

    • AIrUidPartMetadata

      public AIrUidPartMetadata(Supplier<String> aDisplayLabelSupplier, boolean aRequiredForAllItems)
      Constructor using the default builtin origin AInUidEnumDataOrigin for all values.
      Parameters:
      aDisplayLabelSupplier - field name of the field in the UID record to be used for the resolution of the display label in UI
      aRequiredForAllItems - whether the field is required for all given origins

    • AIrUidPartMetadata

      public AIrUidPartMetadata(Supplier<String> displayLabelSupplier, Map<O,Boolean> requiredForOrigin)
      Creates an instance of a AIrUidPartMetadata record class.
      Parameters:
      displayLabelSupplier - the value for the displayLabelSupplier record component
      requiredForOrigin - the value for the requiredForOrigin record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • displayLabelSupplier

      public Supplier<String> displayLabelSupplier()
      Returns the value of the displayLabelSupplier record component.
      Specified by:
      displayLabelSupplier in interface AIiUidPartMetadata<O extends AIiUidEnumDataOrigin>
      Returns:
      the value of the displayLabelSupplier record component

    • requiredForOrigin

      public Map<O,Boolean> requiredForOrigin()
      Returns the value of the requiredForOrigin record component.
      Specified by:
      requiredForOrigin in interface AIiUidPartMetadata<O extends AIiUidEnumDataOrigin>
      Returns:
      the value of the requiredForOrigin record component
